Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Dismiss is Granted. No opposition filed. The Complaint is dismissed with prejudice pursuant to Civil Procedure Code Section 581(f)(2). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
